description.ko: 무한한 우주 공허 속 중앙 특이점을 중심으로 소용돌이치는 암흑 물질과 짙은 보라색 에너지의 심연의 소용돌이입니다.
description.en: An abyssal vortex of dark matter and deep violet energy swirling around a central singularity in the infinite cosmic void.

prompt: A hyper-detailed cinematic visualization of the VOID-3 cosmic deep, titled 'The Event Horizon Eye.' A massive swirling vortex of #0D0221 obsidian dark matter and #3D1A78 deep violet energy in the deepest reaches of space. #7B68EE lavender nebula tendrils wrap around a central gravitational singularity. Distant #E6E6FA soft lavender star clusters flicker through ethereal cosmic dust. 8k resolution, volumetric lighting, sense of infinite scale and cosmic horror mixed with divine majesty.
